creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Perfect! Now I know where to point people when they don't like my code formatting :-) Oooh it's written in intro(9) that I don't have to care about style(9) really ....

> - Include cross-references to as many section 9 pages as reasonable. This improves their discoverability

+1

Are you making a differential revision for this?

Maybe you could start with the same sections NetBSD use, and then just fill in new stuff for FreeBSD?

--HPS
